mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_execution_checkpoint ( id, workflow_instance_id, trace_id, run_id, node_key, checkpoint_type, state_snapshot, metadata, created_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{workflowInstanceId} AS uuid), #{traceId}, #{runId}, #{nodeKey}, #{checkpointType}, CAST(#{stateSnapshot} AS jsonb), CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, workflow_instance_id, trace_id, run_id, node_key, checkpoint_type, state_snapshot::text AS state_snapshot, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at FROM workflow_execution_checkpoint WHERE workflow_instance_id = CAST(#{workflowInstanceId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, workflow_instance_id, trace_id, run_id, node_key, checkpoint_type, state_snapshot::text AS state_snapshot, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at FROM workflow_execution_checkpoint WHERE workflow_instance_id = CAST(#{workflowInstanceId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, workflow_instance_id, trace_id, run_id, node_key, checkpoint_type, state_snapshot::text AS state_snapshot, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at FROM workflow_execution_checkpoint WHERE workflow_instance_id = CAST(#{workflowInstanceId} AS uuid) AND node_key = #{nodeKey} AND checkpoint_type = #{checkpointType} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
